description: Fraudsters lure victims with instant loans, collect sensitive documents or advance payments, install malicious apps and later extort or steal money.
recommended_actions: Do not pay processing fees before loan disbursal.
Install loan apps only from trusted sources.
Verify the lender with RBI before applying.
Report the fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve chats, payment receipts, APKs and call records.

rules.name: Instant Loan Offer
rules.explanation: Promises instant loan approval with minimal checks.
examples: Get ₹5 lakh loan in 5 minutes.
Instant loan approved without paperwork.

rules.name: No CIBIL Required
rules.explanation: Claims loans are approved regardless of credit history.
examples: No CIBIL? No problem!
Guaranteed approval even with bad credit.

rules.name: Processing Fee Request
rules.explanation: Demands advance payment before loan disbursal.
examples: Pay ₹2,999 processing fee to release your loan.
Deposit file charges before disbursal.

rules.name: Insurance or GST Charges
rules.explanation: Requests fake insurance or GST payments.
examples: Pay GST before loan transfer.
Insurance fee required for approval.

rules.name: Aadhaar and PAN Collection
rules.explanation: Collects sensitive identity documents for misuse.
examples: Upload Aadhaar and PAN for verification.
Send your KYC documents on WhatsApp.

rules.name: APK Installation
rules.explanation: Shares APK files outside official app stores.
examples: Install this APK to receive your loan.
Download our app from this link.

rules.name: WhatsApp Loan Agent
rules.explanation: Conducts the entire loan process over messaging apps.
examples: Contact our loan officer on WhatsApp.
Loan approval only through WhatsApp.

rules.name: Fake RBI Registration
rules.explanation: Falsely claims RBI or NBFC approval.
examples: We are RBI approved.
Government registered NBFC.

rules.name: Salary Advance Scam
rules.explanation: Promises salary advances after upfront payment.
examples: Instant salary advance available.
Pay verification fee for salary advance.

rules.name: Recovery and Blackmail
rules.explanation: Threatens victims using stolen contacts or personal data.
examples: We will send notices to all your contacts.
Pay immediately or your photos will be shared.
